classObjective: Use ratios and percentages as metrics to model real-world situations and make decisions.
workedExamples: 1-6, Example 1 — Set Up and Evaluate Ratios as Metrics
1-6, Example 2 — Calculate and Compare Using Different Methods
warmUp: Express 45 out of 200 as a ratio, decimal, and percent
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: ratio metrics, debt-to-income contexts, context-appropriate rounding decisions
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice setting up and evaluating ratios as metrics for real-world decision-making
independentPractice: Practice problems using ratios and percentages as metrics to model and evaluate real-world situations
assessment: Exit ticket: evaluate a ratio metric and explain the decision it informs
capReflection: How does context-appropriate rounding affect the decisions we make with numerical data?
